content.problemStatement:
There are NNN cans lying on the X-axis at points XiX_iXi‚Äč (1‚Č§i‚Č§N)(1 \le i \le N)(1‚Č§i‚Č§N). Each of the N cans is associated with two values AiA_iAi‚Äč and BiB_iBi‚Äč.  Also, the segment between the points LLL and RRR (L‚Č§R)(L \leq R)(L‚Č§R) is considered to be green zone including the points LLL and RRR.
There are two types of operations -

1.1.1. Select a can iii out of the NNN cans and move it one unit in either direction along the axis, i.e. if before the operation can is at XiX_iXi‚Äč then after the operation, it moves to either Xi+1X_i+1Xi‚Äč+1 or Xi‚ąí1X_i-1Xi‚Äč‚ąí1. This costs BiB_iBi‚Äč coins and it can be performed any number of times for each of the cans.

2.2.2. Choose any integer kkk and shift the green zone to the segment between L‚Ä≤L'L‚Ä≤ and R‚Ä≤R'R‚Ä≤, where L‚Ä≤L'L‚Ä≤ and R‚Ä≤R'R‚Ä≤ are the mirror images of points RRR and LLL with respect to line X=kX=kX=k respectively. This operation should be performed **exactly** once.

After all the operations, you get number of coins equal to sum of values of AiA_iAi‚Äč of the cans which lie in the final green zone.
We define the net coins as:

Number of coins you get - Number of coins spent\texttt{Number of coins you get - Number of coins spent}Number of coins you get - Number of coins spent

Find the **maximum** possible net coins you can earn.


Input Format

First line will contain TTT, number of testcases. Then the testcases follow.
Each of the testcases consists of four lines.
First lines consists of three integers NNN, LLL and RRR.
Next line consist of NNN space separated integers X1,X2,...,XNX_1, X_2, ..., X_NX1‚Äč,X2‚Äč,...,XN‚Äč.
Next line consist of NNN space separated integers A1,A2,...,ANA_1, A_2, ..., A_NA1‚Äč,A2‚Äč,...,AN‚Äč.
Next line consist of NNN space separated integers B1,B2,...,BNB_1, B_2, ..., B_NB1‚Äč,B2‚Äč,...,BN‚Äč.


Output Format
For each testcase, output in a single integer, the maximum number of net coins you can earn.
constraints: Sum of NNN over all test cases does not exceed 3‚čÖ1053\cdot 10^53‚čÖ105

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test case 111 : Lets choose the axis at X=5X=5X=5 and Shift the green zone in the range [0,3][0,3][0,3], such that can lies in green zone. So, there is no need for operation of type 111 and total number of coins earned is A1A_1A1‚Äč, i.e. 666.
Test case 222 : Choose the axis at X=8X=8X=8, so the new green zone lies in the region [6,9][6,9][6,9]. Move the can 111 to X=6X=6X=6. Number of coins received is equal to A1+A2A_1+A_2A1‚Äč+A2‚Äč and number of coins spent is 4‚čÖB14\cdot B_14‚čÖB1‚Äč. So, the net coins earned is 20+6‚ąí4=2220+6-4=2220+6‚ąí4=22. This is also the maximum possible.
